The '''Orbital long range scanner (ORL Scanner)''' was a scanner made by [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]]. Used by both the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it detected ships in [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] over many light years' distance, providing advance warning of approaching enemy fleets.

{{Tech-stub}}
